description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages (prepare, build_and_test, deploy) using the default Docker image $IMAGE:$UNITY_VERSION-base-$IMAGE_VERSION and a cache keyed by $CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE-$CI_PROJECT_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG-$TEST_PLATFORM that stores $UNITY_DIR/Library/ and $UNITY_DIR/../unity-builder. In the prepare stage run the get-unity-version job on an alpine image that echoes the Unity version from ProjectVersion.txt into a dotenv artifact. In the build_and_test stage define build jobs (build-StandaloneLinux64, build-StandaloneLinux64-il2cpp, build-StandaloneOSX, build-StandaloneWindows64, build-WebGL, build-android, build-android-il2cpp, build-ios-xcode) each executing before_script "chmod +x ./ci/before_script.sh && ./ci/before_script.sh", script "chmod +x ./ci/build.sh && ./ci/build.sh", after_script "chmod +x ./ci/return_license.sh && ./ci/return_license.sh", using platform‑specific images (e.g., $IMAGE:$UNITY_VERSION-linux-il2cpp-$IMAGE_VERSION) and variables like BUILD_TARGET, SCRIPTING_BACKEND, and BUILD_APP_BUNDLE, and publishing $UNITY_DIR/Builds/ as artifacts. Also in build_and_test add test-editmode, test-editmode-with-junit-reports, test-playmode, and test-playmode-with-junit-reports jobs that run before_script, then either "chmod +x ./ci/test.sh && ./ci/test.sh" for NUNIT tests or install default‑jre and libsaxonb-java, run the test script, and transform NUnit XML to JUnit with "saxonb-xslt -s $UNITY_DIR/$TEST_PLATFORM-results.xml -xsl $CI_PROJECT_DIR/ci/nunit-transforms/nunit3-junit.xslt >$UNITY_DIR/$TEST_PLATFORM-junit-results.xml"; these jobs capture line‑coverage via regex, store JUnit and coverage artifacts for two weeks, and always run the license return script after. Finally, in the deploy stage add a pages job that runs only on the default branch, moves the WebGL build "$UNITY_DIR/Builds/WebGL/${BUILD_NAME}" to a public directory, and publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact.
